findings.summary: current run is a controlled user stop, not a normal FlowPilot completion
a blocker was cleared by user-stop terminal lifecycle, not by the normal PM repair return path
a blocker that looks like local settlement/reconciliation repair was routed to PM repair lane
a blocker retry budget is already exhausted by count but not marked exhausted
terminal run still has open Controller or scheduler rows; safe only as stopped-run history
no route nodes were activated, so per-node execution and reviewer coverage cannot be claimed
normal route-wide completion was not claimed for the current run
packet loop was reconciled into stopped_by_user terminal lifecycle
final summary reports stopped_by_user and forbids controller continuation
